case_title: GEORGE ZISER VS. BERNARD C LEUNG

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ZISER, GEORGE AS TO RESPONDENT LEUNG, BERNARD C AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ZISER, GEORGE

NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AWARD OF COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER ZISER, GEORGE HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-15-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER GEORGE ZISER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AWARD OF COSTS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2008 PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PETITIONER ZISER, GEORGE SERVED MAY-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT LEUNG, BERNARD C AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, MS. WHITE REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE HAS A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER GEORGE ZISER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AWARD OF COSTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ZISER, GEORGE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEUNG, BERNARD C AN INDIVIDUAL $27,272.84 PRINCIPAL, $1,822.68 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,095.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
